name: hijri-converter

metadata.name: hijri-converter
metadata.summary: Accurate Hijri-Gregorian dates converter based on the Umm al-Qura calendar

documentation:
# hijri-converter

A Python package to convert accurately between Hijri and Gregorian dates using
the Umm al-Qura calendar.

> ⚠️ **Deprecation Notice**
>
> This package has been **deprecated** and will not receive future updates.
> Please use the [hijridate](https://pypi.org/project/hijridate/) package
> instead.
>
> For migration to `hijridate`, install the package:
>
> ```
> pip install hijridate~=2.3.0
> ```
>
> Then change the import statement as:
>
> ```py
> from hijridate import Hijri, Gregorian
> ```

## Features

- Accurate and verified date conversion.
- Optimized code performance compared to similar packages.
- Intuitive, clean, and easy-to-use interface.
- Most of the methods and formats are similar to those of standard library.
- Multilingual representation of weekday names, months, and calendar era
  notations.
- Easily extendable to support other natural languages.
- Rich comparison between dates.
- Validation of input dates.
- Works on Python 3.7+ with zero dependencies.
- Thoroughly tested with 100% test coverage.

## Limitations

- The date range supported by converter is limited to the period from the
  beginning of 1343 AH (1 August 1924 CE) to the end of 1500 AH (16 November
  2077 CE).
- The conversion is not intended for religious purposes where sighting of the
  lunar crescent at the beginning of Hijri month is still preferred.

## Installation

To install using `pip`, run:

```shell
pip install hijri-converter
```

To install using `conda`, run:

```shell
conda install -c conda-forge hijri-converter
```

## Basic Usage

```python
from hijri_converter import Hijri, Gregorian


# Convert a Hijri date to Gregorian
g = Hijri(1403, 2, 17).to_gregorian()

# Convert a Gregorian date to Hijri
h = Gregorian(1982, 12, 2).to_hijri()
```

## Documentation

Please see <https://hijri-converter.readthedocs.io> for full documentation of
this package, including background, benchmarking, usage examples and API
reference.

## License

This project is licensed under the terms of the MIT license.

## Acknowledgements

- [R.H. van Gent](http://www.staff.science.uu.nl/~gent0113) — inspiration,
  scientific guidance and resources.
- [@AZalshehri7](https://github.com/AZalshehri7) — support in dates review
  and conversion accuracy verification.

modules.name: hijri_converter.helpers
documentation: Helper methods for Hijri conversion.

functions.name: hijri_converter.helpers.jdn_to_ordinal
documentation:
Convert Julian day number (JDN) to date ordinal number.

Args:
    jdn: Julian day number (JDN).

functions.name: hijri_converter.helpers.ordinal_to_jdn
documentation:
Convert date ordinal number to Julian day number (JDN).

Args:
    don: Date ordinal number.

functions.name: hijri_converter.helpers.jdn_to_rjd
documentation:
Return Reduced Julian Day (RJD) number from Julian day number (JDN).

Args:
    jdn: Julian day number (JDN).

functions.name: hijri_converter.helpers.rjd_to_jdn
documentation:
Return Julian day number (JDN) from Reduced Julian Day (RJD) number.

Args:
    rjd: Reduced Julian Day (RJD) number.

modules.name: hijri_converter
documentation:
Accurate Hijri-Gregorian dates converter based on the Umm al-Qura calendar.

https://github.com/dralshehri/hijri-converter

modules.name: hijri_converter.locales
documentation: Localization for the Hijri month and day names.

functions.name: hijri_converter.locales.get_locale
documentation:
Return an appropriate {obj}`Locale` corresponding to a locale name.

Args:

: name: name of the locale.

classes.name: hijri_converter.locales.Locale

methods.name: hijri_converter.locales.Locale.month_name
documentation:
Return the month name for a specified Hijri month of the year.

Args:
    month: month of year, in range 1-12.

methods.name: hijri_converter.locales.Locale.gregorian_month_name
documentation:
Return the month name for a specified Gregorian month of the year.

Args:
    month: month of year, in range 1-12.

methods.name: hijri_converter.locales.Locale.day_name
documentation:
Return the day name for a specified day of the week.

Args:
    day: day of week, where Monday is 1 and Sunday is 7.
A Locale object represents locale-specific data and functionality.

classes.name: hijri_converter.locales.EnglishLocale
documentation:
An English Locale object represents English locale-specific data and
functionality.

classes.name: hijri_converter.locales.ArabicLocale
documentation:
An Arabic Locale object represents Arabic locale-specific data and
functionality.

classes.name: hijri_converter.locales.BengaliLocale
documentation:
A Bengali Locale object represents Bengali locale-specific data and
functionality.

modules.name: hijri_converter.ummalqura
documentation: Umm al-Qura calendar constants.

variables.name: hijri_converter.ummalqura.GREGORIAN_RANGE
documentation: Inclusive range of supported Gregorian dates (year, month and day).

variables.name: hijri_converter.ummalqura.HIJRI_RANGE
documentation: Inclusive range of supported Hijri dates (year, month and day).

variables.name: hijri_converter.ummalqura.HIJRI_OFFSET
documentation: Total Hijri months elapsed before the beginning of Hijri range.

variables.name: hijri_converter.ummalqura.MONTH_STARTS
documentation:
Ordered list of Reduced Julian Day (RJD) numbers for the beginning of
supported Hijri months.

modules.name: hijri_converter.convert
documentation: Main module of the hijri-converter package.

classes.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.__init__
documentation:
Args:

: year: Hijri year.
  month: Hijri month.
  day: Hijri day.
  validate: Whether to validate Hijri input or not. It's recommended

  > to keep the default for accurate conversion.

Raises:

: OverflowError: When `year` is out of supported Hijri range.
  ValueError: When `month` is not within the range of `1..12`.
  ValueError: When `day` is not within the range of

  > `1..month_length` for month.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.fromisoformat
documentation:
Construct Hijri object from an ISO formatted Hijri date
`YYYY-MM-DD`.

Args:

: date_string: Hijri date in ISO format `YYYY-MM-DD`.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.today
documentation: Construct Hijri object from today's date.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.year
documentation: Return year as an integer.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.month
documentation: Return month as an integer.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.day
documentation: Return day as an integer.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.datetuple
documentation: Return date as a tuple of (year, month, day).

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.isoformat
documentation: Return date in ISO format i.e. `YYYY-MM-DD`.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.dmyformat
documentation:
Return date in day-month-year format (`DD/MM/YYYY` by default).

Args:

: separator: String that separates the day, month, and year values.
  padding: Whether to add a leading zero as a padding character to

  > fill day and month values when less than 10.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.month_length
documentation: Return number of days in month.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.month_name
documentation:
Return month name.

Args:
: language: Language tag for localized month name. Full locale name

  : can be used, e.g. `en-US` or `en_US.UTF-8`. Supported
    languages are `en`, `ar` and `bn`.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.weekday
documentation: Return day of week, where Monday is 0 and Sunday is 6.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.isoweekday
documentation: Return day of week, where Monday is 1 and Sunday is 7.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.day_name
documentation:
Return day name.

Args:
: language: Language tag for localized month name. Full locale name

  : can be used, e.g. `en-US` or `en_US.UTF-8`. Supported
    languages are `en`, `ar` and `bn`.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.notation
documentation:
Return calendar era notation.

Args:
: language: Language tag for localized month name. Full locale name

  : can be used, e.g. `en-US` or `en_US.UTF-8`. Supported
    languages are `en`, `ar` and `bn`.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.to_julian
documentation: Return corresponding Julian day number (JDN).

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri.to_gregorian
documentation: Return Gregorian object for the corresponding Hijri date.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri._check_date
documentation: Check date values if within valid range.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Hijri._month_index
documentation: Return month’s index in ummalqura month starts

A Hijri object represents a date (year, month and day) in lunar Hijri
calendar.

Construct Gregorian object from a Python date object.

Args:
    date_object: Python date object.

Return day name.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Gregorian.to_julian
documentation: Return corresponding Julian day number (JDN).

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Gregorian.to_hijri
documentation:
Return Hijri object for the corresponding Gregorian date.

Raises:
    OverflowError: When date is out of supported Gregorian range.

methods.name: hijri_converter.convert.Gregorian._check_range
documentation: Check if Gregorian date is within valid range.

A Gregorian object represents a date (year, month and day) in Gregorian
calendar.
